title: Product Marketing Manager
required_skills: Product marketing experience with proven GTM strategy and product launch management in technical environment
Quantitative approach — metrics and A/B testing for positioning validation
Self-starter with autonomous workflow management across multiple products
Ability to translate complex technical specs into compelling narratives
Agile operator effective at roadmap planning and hands-on asset creation
matched_skills: B2B GTM strategy — IPC: 4 product launches, event activations, 4.6M CNY contracts
Go-to-market execution — GRG: GTM across 6 product lines, trade fair demos for 100+ B2B clients
Vendor and partner management (IPC: external vendors, channel partners, SOPs)
Marketing KPI tracking and ROI analytics (IPC: campaign KPI reporting, ROI analysis)
Competitive monitoring and market analysis (IPC: competitor reports, ECE Group: market sizing)
Product positioning and messaging — GRG: portfolio gap analysis, launch positioning
missing_skills: A/B testing and quantitative positioning validation
Digital marketing platform and landing page management
Sales deck and digital collateral development for software products
core_responsibilities: Develop and execute end-to-end GTM roadmap for Octimine (AI patent search platform)
Support GTM roadmap for Simple IP — quantitatively test and validate positioning and messaging
Lead strategic marketing roadmap for APIs through partner marketing, PR, co-branded campaigns
Apply data-first mindset via A/B testing, market analytics and performance metrics
Own all marketing collateral from digital landing pages to sales decks
Act as central interface between PMs, Marketing and Sales for enablement and market communication
recommended_emphasis: IPC Marketing: 4 B2B product launches with full GTM strategy execution contributing to 4.6M CNY signed contracts — directly mirrors the product launch ownership mandate
GRG: GTM across 6 product lines with trade fair demos for 100+ B2B clients — evidences multi-product portfolio marketing management
IPC: Competitor monitoring reports and market positioning — relevant to the data-first competitive positioning dimension
ECE Group: Market sizing and competitive analysis packaged into executive reports — demonstrates quantitative market analysis capability
summary: Boru scores 64.3 (moderate match) with genuine B2B product marketing and GTM execution experience from IPC and GRG that maps closely to Dennemeyer X-Labs' requirements. The SaaS context and A/B testing/quantitative positioning dimension are gaps, but the multi-product GTM track record and vendor/partner management experience are strong differentiators. This is a viable application with emphasis on IPC product launch ROI delivery and GRG multi-product portfolio management; acknowledge the SaaS learning curve but position the B2B hardware/IoT GTM background as transferable.
